brand.name: AutoNateAI GameLab
brand.positioning: Roblox quest packs, paid team campaigns, and custom organization game builds.

products.title: Opportunity Arcade Pilot
products.subtitle: A standalone Roblox quest pack for solo practice or invited friends.
products.description: Players collect demand, community, loop, and proof while racing toward a capstone that prepares them for live team events.
products.creator: AutoNate Core Team

products.title: Trend Sniper Sprint
products.subtitle: A timed research quest that turns trend signals into team decisions.
products.description: Built for practice before events: monitor demand, choose a mechanic, collect proof, and decide whether the team should scale.
products.creator: NateDev Studio

products.title: Organization Quest Build
products.subtitle: Turn a program, campaign, or curriculum into a Roblox experience.
products.description: Designed for nonprofits, cities, schools, churches, and workforce programs that need engagement, proof, and distribution.
products.creator: AutoNate Partnerships

products.title: Education Simulation Kit
products.subtitle: Reusable Roblox practice mechanics for solo players, friends, and event prep.
products.description: Includes quest prompts, assessment loops, badge logic, and training structures that prepare players for paid team campaigns.
products.creator: GameLab Learning

products.title: Creator Vendor Pack
products.subtitle: Marketplace listing, product page copy, and asset packaging for Roblox creators.
products.description: A vendor-ready package for creators who want their Roblox assets positioned like commerce products.
products.creator: AutoNate Marketplace Ops

products.title: Thursday CTF Quest Entry
products.subtitle: A paid team competition entry for one Roblox quest night.
products.description: Players join teams, unlock powers through learning mechanics, and compete for a 25% grand-prize pot.
products.creator: AutoNate Events
